tool_input.command:
cat /home/tie303177/.claude/projects/-home-tie303177-work-nabledge-work4--claude-skills-nabledge-6/5275cabd-c3a2-48ec-b157-d0957138e5b1/tool-results/bmw8895qv.txt | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
sections = data.get('sections', [])
for s in sections:
    if 'getProperty' in s.get('title', '') or 'getProperty' in s.get('content', ''):
        print(f'Section ID: {s[\"id\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {s[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Content: {s[\"content\"][:500]}')
        print('---')
"
tool_input.description: Find getProperty sections in BeanUtil knowledge file
